mentors.name: Muhammad Ali
mentors.bio_excerpt: Frontend specialist with 8 years of Angular and React experience. Has shipped large-scale enterprise apps using NgRx and React Query. Passionate about helping juniors level up.

mentors.name: Alex ML
mentors.bio_excerpt: ML researcher turned practitioner. Built production recommendation systems and LLM-powered features. Enjoys guiding people through the complexity of ML pipelines and model evaluation.
